description_long: This helmet features a rounded, dome-like metal shell with a weathered, rusty finish, accented by prominent rivets and a central vertical ridge. Two large, curved horns extend symmetrically from either side, giving it a distinctive Viking or fantasy warrior appearance. The surface is mottled with patches of white and brown, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The rim is reinforced with a band of metal, also studded with rivets, providing both structural integrity and visual interest. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears hollow and designed to fit over a human head. There are no visible straps, visors, or ventilation openings, and the design is utilitarian with no decorative graphics or logos.
description: A weathered metal helmet with large curved horns, riveted bands, and a rustic, aged finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central ridge, symmetrical horns, and riveted band encircling the helmet.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full length and curvature of one horn and the rounded dome of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, the attachment points of the horns, and the riveted band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other horn and the helmet's rounded profile.
